user_intent: Establish a controlled agentic workflow where later agents follow explicit human steering rules.
success_criteria: A steering contract exists before downstream agents begin substantive work
Approval gates are explicit and enforceable by later agents
Stop and escalation conditions are recorded in both human-readable and machine-readable form
constraints: Only steering-related artifacts may be created at this stage
High-risk actions require explicit human approval
Later agents must follow the steering contract
forbidden_actions: Claim the project has been initialized
timeline_preference: Proceed one agent at a time after steering is established.
budget_or_resource_constraints: Do not introduce paid services or external infrastructure without approval
compliance_or_security_requirements: Do not handle secrets or user data without explicit approval
preferred_working_style: Ask concise questions when approval or direction is required.
